scenarios.description: children() rebuilds cache when childNodes modified (stale cache path)
scenarios.path: B0→B1(childNodeSize>0)→B2(sync)→B3(cachedChildren returns stale/null due to modCount mismatch)→B4(stashChildren)→exit
scenarios.precondition: Element with one child, already called children() once to stash cache
scenarios.expectedResult: children() returns updated Elements list reflecting new children after modification
